uplink.description: heartbeat upload — no alarms (motion not detected)
uplink._note: Upstream TTN heartbeat example input. expected.data authored from reference/upstream-codec.js: level=(b5<<8)+b6, temp=b8, tilt sign nibble on b9 (low nibble 1 -> negative of b10=0 -> 0), no fall alarm (b12>>4=0) so motion.detected=false, frameCounter=(b13<<8)+b14.

uplink.description: fall/tilt alarm — motion detected, with level alarm and low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic frame exercising every flag. b12=145 (0x91): high nibble 9 -> fall/tilt alarm -> action.motion.detected=true; low nibble 1 -> batteryLow=true. b11=16 (0x10) high nibble -> alarmLevel=true. b9=16 (low nibble 0) -> positive tilt of b10=45. level=(0<<8)+200=200, temp=b8=18, frameCounter=(0<<8)+2=2.

uplink.description: parameter report frame (bytes[3]==0x03) — not a measurement

errors: parameter report frame carries no normalized measurement

uplink._note: Upstream TTN parameter-packet example input (25 bytes, bytes[3]==0x03). Carries device settings (firmware/intervals/thresholds/work mode), not a measurement, so the normalized codec reports an error rather than emitting config as data.
